lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

Experience automotive perfection with this stunning vehicle in absolute mint condition! It looks and feels brand new, having been meticulously maintained to showroom standards. With flawless paint and a spotless interior, this is a rare find for anyone seeking a car that’s truly like-new. Ready for its next owner to enjoy every mile!

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and absolutely no scratches, chips, or dents. Inside, the cabin is pristine, showing no signs of wear and retaining its original factory feel. Mechanically, it is perfect and has been meticulously maintained. This is a rare find for a collector or buyer seeking a truly mint example.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The interior and exterior show significant wear and damage. Multiple mechanical and electrical systems are currently non-functional and require repair.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its life. Mechanically, it is very reliable; the engine starts up immediately every time and the transmission shifts through all gears smoothly. The exterior shows some minor signs of age, such as small surface scratches and a few light dings, but nothing that impacts the car's overall appearance or performance. The interior is clean and has been smoke-free, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat upholstery. All electronic features, including the climate control and infotainment system, are fully functional. This would make an excellent, dependable daily driver for anyone looking for a solid vehicle without the new-car price tag.
The car is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the exterior or interior and is in like-new condition. It is mechanically flawless.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This unit exhibits no discernible wear, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior environment that reflects a history of climate-controlled storage and meticulous mechanical oversight. For the discerning enthusiast who demands peerless quality and an uncompromising ownership experience, this example stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been pampered its whole life, kept in a garage, and it's sparkling clean inside and out. You won't find a scratch on it! It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, exhibiting perfect compression and a recently serviced double-VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power delivery and exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis has been meticulously preserved, including proactive subframe reinforcement and the installation of upgraded bushings to eliminate deflection. All factory tolerances are within spec, and the suspension geometry remains razor-sharp. With zero oxidative wear on the undercarriage and a flawless factory finish, this vehicle offers the tactile feedback and high-RPM acoustics that define the golden era of M-division engineering. A turnkey investment for the purist.
Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean interior. Garage kept.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, maintained to a standard rarely seen outside of a showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, having been preserved in a climate-controlled garage since day one. Inside, the premium upholstery remains supple and unscuffed, still carrying that distinct factory-fresh aroma. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, and the drive is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. From the pristine alloy wheels to the untouched engine bay, this car represents the pinnacle of its model year. It is a turn-key collector’s dream, requiring nothing but a new owner who appreciates mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in superlative condition, having been curated with exacting standards to preserve its showroom aesthetic and mechanical integrity. Every surface and component reflects a history of meticulous stewardship, offering the most discerning buyer an opportunity to acquire a benchmark example of the model. Experience the pinnacle of refined performance and aesthetic perfection.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive preservation, this vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom condition. Every aspect of this specimen has been maintained to the highest standard, exhibiting a flawless exterior luster and a pristine, untouched interior. For the serious collector seeking a peerless addition to their portfolio, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, combining mechanical integrity with aesthetic perfection.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in total mint condition—honestly, it feels and smells just like it’s brand new! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it runs perfectly. If you're looking for something that’s been loved and kept in pristine shape, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

This E92 M3 represents a superlative example of the high-revving S65 platform. The naturally aspirated 4.0L V8 remains a mechanical masterpiece, featuring eight individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that delivers linear power up to the 8,400 RPM redline. This specimen boasts impeccable factory tolerances, with a 6-speed manual transmission offering precise gate engagement and crisp synchros. The chassis is anchored by Electronic Damper
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Immaculate interior. Mechanically perfect. Garage kept. Single owner.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality specimen, meticulously maintained to satisfy even the most discerning collector. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like factory finish with zero swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover. Inside, the cabin remains in an 'as-delivered' state; the premium leather upholstery shows no creasing or bolster wear, the original floor mats are pristine, and it retains that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, this car is flawless. It features a comprehensive, documented service history with every scheduled maintenance performed ahead of time by certified technicians. The engine bay is exceptionally clean, and the undercarriage reflects the vehicle's life in a climate-controlled environment, free of any corrosion or road grime. All electronics, safety features, and convenience options function exactly as they did the day it left the assembly line. Sold with two sets of keys, all original manuals, and a clean title. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of a modern classic.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that exceeds even the most discerning expectations. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail has been preserved to an exacting degree, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. This is a definitive acquisition for the connoisseur seeking absolute excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and offering a standard of excellence rarely seen on the secondary market. This motorcar has been preserved with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring that every component meets our rigorous criteria for aesthetic and mechanical integrity. For the discerning driver who demands an uncompromising level of quality and a pristine driving experience, this offering represents the definitive choice in its class.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty in person to really appreciate it. It's in absolute pristine condition and has been babied since day one—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like a total dream and is looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. If you're after a ride that's basically flawless and ready to hit the road, this is definitely the one for you!
Offering a museum-grade specimen of the E46 M3, powered by the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six
Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Original paint. Interior flawless. Full service history. Mint condition.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a showroom-quality vehicle that defines the term 'mint condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and shows exactly like it just rolled off the assembly line. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, rock chips, or door dings. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and pristine, still carrying that distinctive new-car scent, while every electronic feature and safety system functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history from certified master technicians and incredibly low mileage. From the untouched alloy wheels wrapped in brand-new performance tires to the crystal-clear panoramic glass roof, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a flawless example of engineering excellence that looks and drives as if it were brand new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. Every aesthetic and mechanical detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our most rigorous criteria for excellence. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained to a rigorous standard that satisfies the most discerning automotive enthusiast. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Mechanically impeccable and historically preserved, this specimen represents a rare opportunity to acquire a definitive investment-grade asset. For those who demand an uncompromising standard of excellence, this vehicle stands as a testament to peak preservation and engineering pedigree.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've absolutely babied this car since day one, and it's in flawless, pristine condition. No scratches, no dents, and it still has that fresh car feel. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering an impeccably preserved E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six power plant with a reinforced subframe and preventatively addressed rod bearings. This example boasts a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The mechanical integrity is absolute, with a documented VANOS overhaul and a suspension geometry tuned for surgical precision. Cloaked in original paint with a flawless interior, this vehicle represents a
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless interior. Performance is factory spec.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, preserved in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, while the interior remains flawless, featuring supple leather and untouched factory trim. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with full documentation provided. Driven sparingly and strictly stored in a climate-controlled garage, it operates with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new car. From the pristine engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels, this is a rare opportunity to own a perfect example of automotive excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a standard that defies its pre-owned status. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising level of preservation, both mechanically and aesthetically. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning driver an experience indistinguishable from a showroom acquisition. We invite you to inspect this masterwork of automotive engineering, which stands as a testament to fastidious ownership and remains in pristine, original condition.
